subject: Stufful, a small pink bear-like Pokemon lying among white daisy-like flowers
description: A small, round, bear-like Pokemon with pink coloring lies nestled among a dense field of white daisy-like flowers. Its stubby limbs are visible and its expression is cheerful and wide-eyed, looking upward. The creature has a distinctive striped or banded pattern on its body. The floral setting is bright and colorful, filling the entire background with white petals and green stems. The overall composition is warm, cozy, and playful.
foreground: small pink bear-like Pokemon lying among white flowers, looking up
background: dense field of white daisy-like flowers with green stems
emotion: cheerful, wide-eyed, at ease — lying relaxed among flowers
